interface.editor: Microsoft MakeCode Arcade is a block-based editor for creating retro games.
interface.main_categories: Sprites (for characters), Controller (for inputs), Game (for logic and updates), and Music.

technical_constraints.sprites: You must define a 'kind' (Player, Enemy, Projectile, Food) for collision logic to work.
technical_constraints.tilemaps: Use tilemaps to create the walls and floor of your game levels.

tips: Use the 'on sprite overlaps' event to handle what happens when the player touches an enemy.
Variables are essential for tracking 'Life' and 'Score'.
